videos.headline: Dillon Gabriel links up with Jayden Gibson for his 3rd TD pass
videos.description: Jayden Gibson dances through the Iowa State defense for a touchdown to pad Oklahoma's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dillon Gabriel links up with Jayden Gibson for his 3rd TD pass) 2023/09/30 ESHEET
